name: @barazo/plugin-signatures
description: Display a personal signature below forum posts. Supports plain text or markdown. Portable across all Barazo instances via AT Protocol.

contentMode.label: Signature format
contentMode.description: Allow plain text only, or also permit markdown formatting.

maxCharacters.label: Maximum characters
maxCharacters.description: Character limit for signatures on this community.

displayMode.label: Display frequency
displayMode.description: Show signatures on every post, or only on a user's first post per thread.

newMemberDelay.label: New member delay (days)
newMemberDelay.description: Days a new member must wait before setting a signature. 0 for immediate.
